name: Slack Privileged Accounts on Personal Email Domains
description: Detects privileged slack accounts tied to personal email domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.email AS email FROM slack_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.deleted, false) = false AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true OR COALESCE(u.is_owner, false) = true OR COALESCE(u.is_primary_owner, false) = true) AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate privileged accounts to corporate identity domains and remove personal-domain privileged access.
